sections.paragraph:
verb לחלוש

to dominate, command; become weak, weaken

verb להיחלש

be weakened; to weaken

verb להחליש

to weaken, enfeeble

verb הוחלש

be weakened, enfeebled; become weak, feeble

masculine noun and adjective

weak, frail, faint, feeble, weakly, unmanly, flimsy, fragile, rickety, feckless, flabby, effete, flagging, forceless, impuissant, languid, languorous, low, pale, puny, small, tottery
